chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. NO.D-4829 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs Fresh case 1. For orders on Misc. No.20222/2025 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objections 1 to 3 3. For orders on Misc. No.20223/2025 (Exp/A) 4. For hearing of main case ---------------------------------------------- 09.10.2025 Mr. Maroof Hussain Hashmi, advocate for petitioner ------------------------ The main grievance of the petitioner is that he is being harassed by the official respondents. The official respondents are directed to act strictly in accordance with law. A copy of this Order shall be sent to the Inspector General of Police Sindh, for compliance. The petition stands disposed of in the above terms along with pending applications. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES J U D G E Gulsher/PS
